@graph.label: General Frobenioid theory (Frd I/II) is essential to the IUT proof, not merely decorative (Mochizuki)
@graph.specific_support: IUTchI Thm A p.13: a Hodge theater is 'in essence, a system of Frobenioids'; IUTchI Abstract p.1: the Theta-link relates Frobenioid-theoretic portions incompatibly with ring structure; IUTchI p.13 (before Thm A): the étale-like vs. Frobenius-like dichotomy 'will play a key role in the theory developed in the present series of papers.'
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level summary with verbatim short quotations from IUTchI.

@graph.label: The global realified Frobenioid actually used at Cor.3.12 is very elementary and equivalent to ordered 1-dim R-vector spaces (Scholze-Stix 2018)
@graph.specific_objection: SS 2018 p.7 §2.1.4 verbatim: 'the notion of a global realified Frobenioid is very elementary'; 'the category of global realified Frobenioids is equivalent to the category of ordered 1-dimensional R-vector spaces.' SS p.10: global realified Frobenioids from F^{⊩×µ}-prime strips are 'always canonically trivial using the various γ_can' — the elementary nature of this object feeds the main SS objection that the resulting inequality is empty.
@graph.fair_use_note: Statement-level summary with verbatim short quotations from SS 2018 pp.7, 10.
